report_title: That AI Extension Helping You Write Emails? It's Reading Them First

iocs.malware_family: Chrome MCP Server - AI Browser Control (RAT)
iocs.context: The extension hardcodes a WebSocket connection to a remote C2 server at wss://mcp-browser.qubecare.ai/chrome, establishing persistent bidirectional communication for command dispatch.
iocs.source_section: A RAT: MCP Server AI Automation Extension

iocs.context: A content script collects comprehensive email data including subject, sender, recipients, body and thread ID and POSTs it to api.gosupersonic.email/collect.
iocs.source_section: Adversary in the Browser (AitB): Supersonic AI

iocs.context: Supersonic AI extension is associated with the domain gosupersonic.email used for data exfiltration of email content including OTPs.

iocs.malware_family: Reverse Recruiting - AI Job Application Assistant (Infostealer)
iocs.context: The extension's profile-sync.js script transmits the user's name, email, phone, LinkedIn URL, salary expectations, education and resume to api.reverserecruiting.io/v1/profile/sync.
iocs.source_section: Infostealer: Reverse Recruiting — AI Job Application Assistant

iocs.context: All user searches are routed through chatgptforchrome.com and correlated with a persistent tracking ID, building a cross-device search history profile.
iocs.source_section: Search Hijacker: Chat AI for Chrome

iocs.malware_family: Adobe Express: AI Photo, Video (Brand Impersonator)
iocs.context: The thanks.html file communicated with a URL hosted on xuix.top, which redirected to newextensioninstallweb.com/2025 to drive traffic to third-party browser installs.
iocs.source_section: Brand Impersonator: AI Photo and Video Editor

iocs.malware_family: Adobe Express: AI Photo, Video (Brand Impersonator)
iocs.context: The thanks.html page redirected to newextensioninstallweb.com/2025, a page promoting installation of Opera GX browser as a third-party install campaign.
iocs.source_section: Brand Impersonator: AI Photo and Video Editor

iocs.context: The extension manifest shows external connectivity to huiyiai.net and the extension requests broad permissions including proxy, webRequest and unlimitedStorage far exceeding translation needs.
The extension downloads a proxy auto-configuration (PAC) script from yiban.io/extension/proxy.pac?t=huiyi on startup to route user traffic through attacker-controlled proxy servers.
The extension named 'browser cash' with 30,000 users is listed as a high-risk extension masquerading as an AI application associated with domain browser.cash.
The Nano Banana extension with 4,000 users is listed as a high-risk extension associated with the domain banana.summarizer.one/quota.
A malicious extension impersonating Notion with 3,000 users is listed as a high-risk extension associated with the domain notionapp.cn.
The extension named 'Ask AI - GPT chat' with 1,000 users is listed as a high-risk extension masquerading as an AI application associated with domain vomet.ru.

iocs.malware_family: Picsart: AI Photo Video Editor (Brand Impersonator)
iocs.context: The extension impersonating Picsart AI Photo Video Editor with 608 users is listed as a high-risk extension associated with the domain pic-editor-chromeextension.uno.
